title: Experience
description: Work experience across software, AI, products, and technology organizations

roles.name: Since AI
roles.description: Since AI is building a global, execution-focused AI innovation ecosystem — bringing together developers, researchers, founders, investors, and industry partners to turn frontier AI into real products, pilots, and companies.

roles.name: Root

roles.name: Kolt
roles.description: Kolt develops automation solutions that address complex operational challenges through advanced technology integration — building robust platforms across multiple technical domains for mission-critical applications.

roles.name: Attractor
roles.description: Attractor is a technology consultancy building production-grade software, applied AI, and security-first systems. Working at the intersection of commercial execution and technical delivery — client discovery, scoping, proposals, and partnerships, alongside hands-on AI implementation and solution architecture.
